message:
fix(harness): restore rustfmt compliance and fix btrfs FUSE E2E write-path failures

btrfs_kernel_reference.rs: collapse multi-line iterator chain to satisfy
rustfmt --check (no semantic change).

fuse_e2e.rs: btrfs FUSE E2E tests (create, write, rename, xattr, setattr,
fsync, statfs) were failing because default_permissions mounts require
pre-existing writable directories. Seed a "testdir" workspace into the btrfs
image via mkfs.btrfs --rootdir with mode 0o777, then run write-path tests
inside that workspace. Refactor with_btrfs_rw_mount to delegate through a
new with_btrfs_rw_root_mount helper; readdir and statfs tests use root mount
directly while write-path tests target the seeded workspace.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
